title: ST ANTHONY HOSPITAL - 211info
text: CHI ST ANTHONY HOSPITAL ST ANTHONY HOSPITAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides emergency room services. Also operates clinics for cancer, internal medicine, family medicine, orthopedics, surgery, urology, and women's health. 2801 St Anthony Way Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 276-5121 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 276-5121 Financial Assistance (541) 278-3244 Emergency Department (541) 278-3255 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in for emergency services FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare and private insurances. Financial assistance and payment plans may be available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Grant, Morrow, Umatilla, and Union Counties Services: Emergency Room Care Hospitals Pap Tests Physical Therapy Other Services Offered At This Location: PUBLIC SAFETY - CHILD PASSENGER SAFETY SEATS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
